amqp.auto_ack: Enable automatic message acknowledgements (0/1). 1 means messages are auto-acked on delivery.
amqp.cacert: Path to CA certificate file for verifying AMQP server TLS certificates.
amqp.cert: Path to client certificate file for mutual TLS authentication.
amqp.channel_max: Maximum number of channels per AMQP connection (0 = server decides; typical default 2047/65535).
amqp.connect_timeout: Connection timeout in seconds for opening AMQP connections (0 = infinite).
amqp.deserialization_depth: Maximum depth for PHP value deserialization to avoid deep recursion (integer).
amqp.frame_max: Maximum AMQP frame size in bytes (negotiated with server).
amqp.global_prefetch_count: Global QoS prefetch messages count across all consumers (0 = unlimited).
amqp.global_prefetch_size: Global QoS prefetch size in octets across all consumers (0 = unlimited).
amqp.heartbeat: Heartbeat interval in seconds for connection liveness (0 = disabled, typical 60s).
amqp.key: Path to client private key file for TLS authentication (if separate from cert).
amqp.port: Default AMQP broker TCP port (5672 for AMQP, 5671 for AMQPS).
amqp.prefetch_count: QoS prefetch messages count per consumer/channel (0 = unlimited).
amqp.prefetch_size: QoS prefetch size per consumer/channel in octets (0 = unlimited).
amqp.read_timeout: Socket read timeout in seconds for AMQP operations (0 = infinite).
amqp.rpc_timeout: Timeout in seconds for RPC-style AMQP calls (0 = infinite).
amqp.sasl_method: SASL auth method. Common: AMQP_SASL_METHOD_PLAIN, AMQP_SASL_METHOD_EXTERNAL.
amqp.serialization_depth: Maximum depth for PHP value serialization to AMQP (integer).
amqp.timeout: General AMQP socket timeout in seconds for I/O (legacy/driver dependent).
amqp.verify: Verify peer certificate when using TLS (0/1).
amqp.vhost: Default AMQP virtual host to connect to.
amqp.write_timeout: Socket write timeout in seconds for AMQP operations (0 = infinite).
apc.coredump_unmap: Attempt to unmap shared memory segments on crash to avoid large core dumps (Off/On).
apc.entries_hint: Hint for expected number of cache entries (0 lets APCu decide).
apc.gc_ttl: Seconds a cache entry can remain in the garbage collection list.
apc.preload_path: Directory to preload into APCu at startup (optional).
apc.serializer: Serializer to use for APCu values. Common: 'php', 'igbinary', 'msgpack'.
apc.shm_segments: Number of shared memory segments to use for APCu.
apc.shm_size: Size of the APCu shared memory segment, e.g. 64M.
apc.slam_defense: Protect against cache stampede by delaying writes (On/Off).
apc.ttl: Default time-to-live for cache entries (0 = infinite).
apc.use_request_time: Use request start time for TTL calculations (On/Off).
awscrt.log_level: AWS CRT PHP log level. Values: 'Trace','Debug','Info','Warn','Error','Fatal'.
bcmath.scale: Default scale (number of decimal digits) for BCMath operations.
blackfire.agent_socket: Blackfire agent socket address (tcp://host:port or unix:///path.sock).
blackfire.apm_agent_timeout_ms: Timeout in milliseconds for APM agent communication.
blackfire.apm_browser_collector_endpoint: Custom endpoint for browser RUM collection.
blackfire.apm_browser_probe_url: Probe loader URL injected in pages for RUM.
blackfire.apm_connect_at_startup: Connect to Blackfire agent at PHP startup (0/1).
blackfire.apm_lock_duration: Lock duration (seconds) to throttle repeated APM events.
blackfire.debug.sigsegv_handler: Enable Blackfire SIGSEGV handler for debugging (0/1).
blackfire.features.auto_profiling: Automatically profile requests based on triggers (0/1).
blackfire.log_file: Path to Blackfire log file (STDERR by default).
com.allow_dcom: Allow Distributed COM (DCOM) remote activation in com_dotnet (Off/On).
com.code_page: Code page number for COM string conversions (empty = system default).
com.dotnet_version: Target .NET runtime version for com_dotnet interop (e.g., 'v2.0.50727').
com.typelib_file: Path to a type library (TLB) file to register for COM use.
couchbase.allow_fallback_to_bucket_conne: Allow fallback to bucket-level connection when cluster auth fails (0/1).
couchbase.decoder.json_arrays: Return JSON as arrays (1) or objects (0) when decoding.
couchbase.encoder.compression: Client-side compression for values. Values: 'off','fastlz','zlib','lz4' (depending on build).
couchbase.encoder.compression_factor: Compression factor (tuning parameter for some algorithms).
couchbase.encoder.compression_threshold: Minimum value size (bytes) before attempting compression (0 disables threshold check).
couchbase.log_level: Couchbase client log level. Values: TRACE, DEBUG, INFO, WARN, ERROR, FATAL.
couchbase.log_path: Path to write Couchbase client logs (empty = default/disabled).
couchbase.log_php_log_err: Send Couchbase logs to PHP error log (0/1).
couchbase.persistent_timeout: Timeout for persistent connection reuse in seconds (-1 = unlimited).
couchbase.pool.max_idle_time_sec: Maximum idle time (seconds) for pooled connections.
curl.cainfo: Path to a bundle of CA certificates for SSL verification in cURL.
date.default_latitude: Default latitude for sunrise/sunset calculations (float degrees).
date.default_longitude: Default longitude for sunrise/sunset calculations (float degrees).
date.sunrise_zenith: Zenith angle used for sunrise calculation (degrees). Typical: 90.833333.
date.sunset_zenith: Zenith angle used for sunset calculation (degrees). Typical: 90.833333.
dba.default_handler: Supported handlers: cdb cdb_make inifile flatfile qdbm lmdb
datadog.agent_host: Hostname of Datadog agent for APM/telemetry (overrides default localhost).
datadog.amqp_analytics_enabled: Enable analytics events for AMQP spans (On/Off). Requires sample rate setting.
datadog.api_key: Datadog API key (used for agentless features or RUM).
datadog.autoload_no_compile: Do not compile autoloaded files for tracing bootstrap (On/Off).
datadog.code_origin_max_user_frames: Maximum number of user frames to record for code origin.
datadog.dbm_propagation_mode: Database Monitoring propagation mode. Values: 'disabled','service','full' (varies by version).
datadog.dogstatsd_url: Unix or UDP URL for DogStatsD (e.g., unix:///path.sock or udp://host:port).
datadog.dynamic_instrumentation.redacted: Comma-separated identifiers whose values should be redacted in dynamic instrumentation.
Comma-separated PHP types or classes to redact in dynamic instrumentation.
datadog.env: Environment tag (e.g., 'prod','staging') applied to all traces/metrics.
datadog.exception_replay_capture_interva: Min interval between exception replay captures (seconds).
datadog.exception_replay_capture_max_fra: Max stack frames to capture for exception replay (-1 for unlimited).
datadog.git_commit_sha: Git commit SHA used for source code integration.
datadog.git_repository_url: Git repository URL for source code integration.
datadog.googlespanner_analytics_enabled: Enable analytics for Google Spanner spans (On/Off).
datadog.googlespanner_analytics_sample_r: Analytics sample rate for Google Spanner (0.0–1.0).
datadog.guzzle_analytics_enabled: Enable analytics for Guzzle HTTP client (On/Off).
datadog.http_server_route_based_naming: Name root spans by matched route rather than URL (On/Off).
datadog.inject_force: Always inject tracing headers into outgoing requests (On/Off).
datadog.instrumentation_telemetry_enable: Enable sending instrumentation telemetry to Datadog (On/Off).
datadog.laravelqueue_analytics_sample_ra: Analytics sample rate for Laravel Queue (0.0–1.0).
datadog.log_backtrace: Include stack backtrace in Datadog logs (On/Off).
datadog.logs_injection: Inject trace IDs into logs automatically (On/Off).
datadog.openai_log_prompt_completion_sam: Sample rate for logging prompts/completions for OpenAI (0.0–1.0).
datadog.openai_metrics_enabled: Enable metrics collection for OpenAI usage (On/Off).
datadog.openai_service: Override Datadog service name for OpenAI spans.
datadog.openai_span_char_limit: Maximum characters to capture in OpenAI span attributes.
datadog.openai_span_prompt_completion_sa: Sampling for attaching prompt/completion text to spans (0.0–1.0).
datadog.psr18_analytics_enabled: Enable analytics for PSR-18 HTTP clients (On/Off).
datadog.service: Default Datadog service name for traces.
datadog.service_mapping: CSV map of library service names to override, e.g., 'redis:cache,postgres:db'.
datadog.span_sampling_rules: JSON rules for secondary span sampling (array of rules with service/name/sample_rate).
datadog.span_sampling_rules_file: Path to JSON file with span sampling rules.
datadog.symfonymessenger_analytics_sampl: Analytics sample rate for Symfony Messenger (0.0–1.0).
datadog.tags: Global tags in 'key:value' comma-separated format appended to traces/metrics.
datadog.telemetry_log_collection_enabled: Enable collection of library logs for telemetry (On/Off).
datadog.trace.agent_connect_timeout: Connect timeout (ms) for the trace agent.
datadog.trace.agent_debug_verbose_curl: Enable verbose cURL logging for agent calls (On/Off).
datadog.trace.agent_flush_after_n_reques: Flush agent transport after N requests (0 = default behavior).
datadog.trace.agent_max_payload_size: Max payload size (bytes) per agent request.
datadog.trace.agent_port: Explicit agent port override (usually set via URL/host).
datadog.trace.agent_retries: Number of retries for agent communication.
datadog.trace.agent_stack_backlog: Background sender backlog size (number of payloads).
datadog.trace.agent_test_session_token: Test session token for CI Visibility.
datadog.trace.agent_url: Agent URL (e.g., http://localhost:8126). Overrides host/port settings.
datadog.trace.agentless: Enable agentless mode (send directly to Datadog) (On/Off).
datadog.trace.append_trace_ids_to_logs: Append trace and span IDs to logs automatically (On/Off).
datadog.trace.auto_flush_enabled: Flush traces automatically at request end (On/Off).
datadog.trace.baggage_max_bytes: Maximum size (bytes) for W3C baggage header content.
datadog.trace.baggage_max_items: Maximum number of baggage key-value pairs.
datadog.trace.baggage_tag_keys: Comma-separated list of baggage keys to promote as span tags.
datadog.trace.beta_high_memory_pressure_: Memory usage percent threshold to enable high-pressure behavior.
datadog.trace.buffer_size: In-process buffer size (bytes) for collected spans.
datadog.trace.client_ip_enabled: Detect and tag client IP on server spans (On/Off).
datadog.trace.client_ip_header: Comma-separated headers to read client IP from (e.g., 'X-Forwarded-For').
datadog.trace.db_client_split_by_instanc: Use DB instance name in service naming (On/Off).
datadog.trace.debug_curl_output: Dump raw cURL traffic to logs (On/Off).
datadog.trace.debug_prng_seed: Set PRNG seed for reproducible sampling (-1 = random).
datadog.trace.generate_root_span: Create a root span for each request (On/Off).
datadog.trace.git_metadata_enabled: Enable Git metadata capture for traces (On/Off).
datadog.trace.googlespanner_analytics_sa: Analytics sample rate for Google Spanner (0.0–1.0).
datadog.trace.header_tags: Comma-separated HTTP headers to add as span tags (case-insensitive).
datadog.trace.health_metrics_heartbeat_s: Sample rate for health metric heartbeats (0.0–1.0).
datadog.trace.hook_limit: Maximum number of function hooks to register for instrumentation.
datadog.trace.http_client_error_statuses: HTTP status codes considered client errors, e.g., '400-499'.
datadog.trace.http_client_split_by_domai: Split HTTP client services by destination domain (On/Off).
datadog.trace.http_post_data_param_allow: Whitelist POST param names to record as tags (comma-separated).
datadog.trace.http_server_error_statuses: HTTP status codes considered server errors, e.g., '500-599'.
datadog.trace.http_url_query_param_allow: Whitelist URL query parameters to keep (comma-separated or '*' for all).
datadog.trace.kafka_distributed_tracing: Propagate tracing context through Kafka messages (On/Off).
datadog.trace.laravel_queue_distributed_: Propagate context via Laravel Queue messages (On/Off).
datadog.trace.laravelqueue_analytics_sam: Analytics sample rate for Laravel Queue (0.0–1.0).
datadog.trace.log_file: Path to ddtrace internal log file.
datadog.trace.measure_compile_time: Record PHP compile time in root span (On/Off).
datadog.trace.measure_peak_memory_usage: Record peak memory usage as span metric (On/Off).
datadog.trace.memory_limit: Hard limit (bytes) for tracer memory usage (empty = no additional limit).
datadog.trace.obfuscation_query_string_r: Regex to redact sensitive data in URLs, headers, and payloads.
datadog.trace.once_logs: Log certain warnings only once per process (On/Off).
datadog.trace.openai_enabled: Enable instrumentation for OpenAI client libraries (On/Off).
datadog.trace.propagate_user_id_default: Propagate user ID by default as a tag/header (On/Off).
datadog.trace.propagation_style: Comma-separated injection+extraction styles. Values include: datadog,tracecontext,baggage,B3,B3 single header.
datadog.trace.propagation_style_extract: Comma-separated extraction header styles. Values: datadog,tracecontext,B3,B3 single header,baggage.
datadog.trace.propagation_style_inject: Comma-separated injection header styles. Values: datadog,tracecontext,baggage.
datadog.trace.rate_limit: Max traces per second sent to the agent (client-side limiter).
datadog.trace.redis_client_split_by_host: Split Redis service names by host (On/Off).
datadog.trace.remove_autoinstrumentation: Remove spans without parents created by auto-instrumentation (On/Off).
datadog.trace.remove_root_span_laravel_q: Do not create root span for Laravel queue workers (On/Off).
datadog.trace.remove_root_span_symfony_m: Do not create root span for Symfony Messenger workers (On/Off).
datadog.trace.report_hostname: Report host name on root spans (On/Off).
datadog.trace.resource_uri_fragment_rege: Regex to replace URI fragments with placeholders for resource naming.
datadog.trace.resource_uri_mapping_incom: Comma-separated URI mapping rules for incoming requests 'regex:replacement'.
datadog.trace.resource_uri_mapping_outgo: Comma-separated URI mapping rules for outgoing requests 'regex:replacement'.
datadog.trace.resource_uri_query_param_a: Comma-separated URL query param whitelist for resource names.
datadog.trace.sample_rate: Global sampling rate for traces (0.0–1.0, -1 = agent decides).
datadog.trace.sampling_rules_format: Format of sampling rules. Values: 'glob','regex' (varies by version).
datadog.trace.shutdown_timeout: Timeout (ms) to flush traces during PHP shutdown.
datadog.trace.sources_path: Path to local sources for code origin mapping (to compute repository/commit metadata).
datadog.trace.spans_limit: Maximum number of spans per trace (drops extras).
datadog.trace.symfony_messenger_distribu: Propagate context in Symfony Messenger messages (On/Off).
datadog.trace.symfony_messenger_middlewa: Enable Symfony Messenger middlewares for tracing (On/Off).
datadog.trace.symfonymessenger_analytics: Analytics sample rate for Symfony Messenger (0.0–1.0).
datadog.trace.traced_internal_functions: Comma-separated list of internal functions to trace (e.g., 'strpos,strlen').
datadog.trace.url_as_resource_names_enab: Use raw URL path for resource names (On/Off). Disable to use route-based naming.
datadog.trace.warn_legacy_dd_trace: Warn if legacy dd_trace API is used (On/Off).
datadog.trace.web_enabled: Enable web server span creation for HTTP requests (On/Off).
datadog.trace.websocket_messages_inherit: Websocket messages inherit parent sampling decision (On/Off).
datadog.trace.websocket_messages_separat: Create separate traces for websocket messages (On/Off).
datadog.trace.wordpress_additional_actio: Comma-separated list of additional WordPress actions to instrument.
datadog.trace.wordpress_callbacks: Enable tracing of WordPress hooks and callbacks (On/Off).
datadog.trace.x_datadog_tags_max_length: Maximum length of x-datadog-tags header value (bytes).
datadog.trace.zendframework_analytics_sa: Analytics sample rate for Zend Framework (0.0–1.0).
datadog.version: Application version tag to attach to traces (semantic version string).
datadog.web_analytics_sample_rate: Alias of web analytics sample rate (0.0–1.0).
datadog.wordpress_analytics_sample_rate: Alias sample rate for WordPress analytics (0.0–1.0).
datadog.yii_analytics_sample_rate: Alias sample rate for Yii analytics (0.0–1.0).
datadog.zendframework_analytics_sample_r: Alias sample rate for Zend Framework analytics (0.0–1.0).
dl_test.long: Test extension flag (boolean) for long option; used in PHP test suite.
dl_test.string: Test extension string option; used in PHP test suite.
exif.decode_jis_intel: Encoding to use when decoding JIS for Intel-endian EXIF data.
exif.decode_jis_motorola: Encoding to use when decoding JIS for Motorola-endian EXIF data.
exif.encode_jis: Encoding to use when encoding JIS in EXIF output (empty to disable).
exif.encode_unicode: Encoding to use when encoding Unicode in EXIF output (e.g., ISO-8859-15).
ffi.enable: Enable FFI API. Values: 'preload', 'true', 'false' depending on PHP version and security.
ffi.preload: List of C header files to preload for FFI (comma/space separated paths).
filter.default: Default filter applied to input. Values: 'unsafe_raw','string','full_special_chars', etc.
filter.default_flags: Default flags for the default filter (bitmask, e.g., FILTER_FLAG_STRIP_LOW).
gd.jpeg_ignore_warning: Ignore minor JPEG warnings to continue decoding (On/Off).
geoip.custom_directory: Directory containing GeoIP database files for the geoip extension.
grpc.grpc_trace: Comma-separated gRPC trace components to enable (e.g., 'api,http,call_error').
grpc.grpc_verbosity: gRPC log verbosity. Values: DEBUG, INFO, ERROR.
grpc.log_filename: Write gRPC library logs to this file (empty = STDERR).
grpc.poll_strategy: Override gRPC poll strategy (e.g., 'epoll1','poll','select'; leave empty for auto).
ibase.dateformat: Default date format for InterBase (strftime syntax).
ibase.max_links: Maximum number of InterBase connections (-1 = unlimited).
ibase.max_persistent: Maximum number of persistent InterBase connections (-1 = unlimited).
ibase.timeformat: Default time format for InterBase (strftime syntax).
ibase.timestampformat: Default timestamp format for InterBase (strftime syntax).
iconv.input_encoding: Default input encoding for iconv if not specified.
iconv.internal_encoding: Default internal encoding (deprecated in PHP 5.6+, unused).
iconv.output_encoding: Default output encoding for iconv if not specified.
igbinary.compact_strings: Store short strings compactly to save space (On/Off).
imagick.allow_zero_dimension_images: Allow creating images with zero width/height (0/1).
imagick.set_single_thread: Force ImageMagick to use a single thread (1) for stability.
imagick.shutdown_sleep_count: Milliseconds to sleep during Imagick shutdown to avoid segfaults.
imap.enable_insecure_rsh: Allow rsh/ssh insecure IMAP connections (Off/On) (not recommended).
immutable_cache.coredump_unmap: Attempt to unmap SHM on crash to reduce core dump size (Off/On).
immutable_cache.entries_hint: Hint for expected entries count to size hash tables.
immutable_cache.preload_path: Directory to preload into immutable cache at startup.
immutable_cache.protect_memory: Protect SHM pages (read-only) to detect writes (Off/On).
immutable_cache.serializer: Serializer used by immutable_cache. Values: 'default','igbinary', etc.
immutable_cache.shm_segments: Number of shared memory segments used by immutable_cache.
immutable_cache.shm_size: Size of immutable_cache shared memory segment (e.g., 64M).
intl.error_level: Intl error reporting level (this is a PHP error level, such as E_WARNING).
intl.use_exceptions: Throw exceptions instead of warnings for intl errors (On/Off).
ioncube.loader.encoded_paths: Restrict ionCube to only load encoded files from these paths (CSV patterns).
json_post.flags: Flags for json_post parsing (bitmask for JSON decode options): 1|2|3|1048576|2097152
json_post.onerror.exit: Exit script on JSON POST parse error (0/1).
json_post.onerror.response: Send HTTP error response on JSON POST parse error (0/1).
json_post.onerror.warning: Emit warning on JSON POST parse error (0/1).
ldap.max_links: Maximum number of LDAP links (-1 = unlimited).
mailparse.def_charset: Default charset used by mailparse when unspecified (e.g., 'us-ascii').
mbstring.detect_order: Auto-detection order for encodings (comma-separated), empty = all.
mbstring.func_overload: Overload string functions to multibyte (deprecated; 0–7 bitmask).
mbstring.http_input: HTTP input character encoding (comma-separated or auto).
mbstring.http_output_conv_mimetypes: Regex of MIME types to apply output conversion to.
mbstring.internal_encoding: Internal character encoding (deprecated, ignored in newer PHP).
mbstring.language: Default language for mbstring (affects mail encoding); e.g., 'Japanese','neutral'.
mbstring.regex_retry_limit: Max steps for Oniguruma regex retry loop (int).
mbstring.regex_stack_limit: Stack limit for Oniguruma regex engine (int).
mbstring.substitute_character: Character or 'none' used when invalid chars are encountered.
mcrypt.algorithms_dir: Directory that contains mcrypt algorithms (legacy extension).
mcrypt.modes_dir: Directory that contains mcrypt modes (legacy extension).
memcache.allow_failover: Allow failover to other servers on error (0/1).
memcache.chunk_size: Data chunk size sent to memcache servers (bytes).
memcache.compress_threshold: Minimum value size (bytes) to enable compression.
memcache.hash_function: Hash function for server selection. Values: 'crc32','fnv','hsieh' (build-dependent).
memcache.lock_timeout: Lock timeout (seconds) used by memcache session handler.
memcache.max_failover_attempts: Max attempts to fail over to other servers before giving up.
memcache.prefix_host_key: Use host name as part of key prefix (On/Off).
memcache.prefix_host_key_remove_subdomai: Remove subdomain from host key prefix (On/Off).
memcache.prefix_host_key_remove_www: Remove leading 'www' from host key prefix (On/Off).
memcache.prefix_static_key: Static string prefix for all memcache keys.
memcache.protocol: Memcache text protocol variant. Values: 'ascii' (default) or 'binary' (if supported).
memcache.redundancy: Number of redundant copies to write in consistent hashing setups.
memcache.session_prefix_host_key: Include host name in memcache session key prefix (On/Off).
memcache.session_prefix_host_key_remove_: Remove subdomain in session host key prefix (On/Off).
Remove 'www' in session host key prefix (On/Off).
memcache.session_prefix_static_key: Static session key prefix for memcache session handler.
memcache.session_redundancy: Redundancy for session writes (number of servers to write to).
memcache.session_save_path: Save path for memcache session handler (server list).
memcached.compression_level: Compression level for the chosen algorithm (e.g., fastlz,zlib).
memcached.default_connect_timeout: Default connect timeout (ms) for new connections (0 = libmemcached default).
memcached.item_size_limit: Soft limit on item size (bytes). 0 means disabled (server limit applies).
memcached.sess_binary_protocol: Use binary protocol for session handler (On/Off).
memcached.sess_consistent_hash: Enable consistent hashing for session handler (On/Off).
memcached.sess_lock_expire: Session lock TTL (seconds). 0 = auto based on max execution time.
memcached.sess_lock_max_wait: Max total time (ms) to wait for acquiring session lock.
memcached.sess_lock_retries: Number of attempts to acquire session lock.
memcached.sess_lock_wait: Wait time (ms) between lock attempts (backoff interval).
memcached.sess_number_of_replicas: Number of replicas for session data in cluster (0 = none).
memcached.sess_persistent: Use persistent connections for session handler (On/Off).
memcached.sess_remove_failed_servers: Remove failed servers from pool automatically (On/Off).
memcached.sess_sasl_password: SASL password for session handler when using authentication.
memcached.sess_sasl_username: SASL username for session handler when using authentication.
memcached.sess_server_failure_limit: Number of failures before marking a server as failed (0 = default).
memcached.store_retry_count: Number of attempts to retry store operations on failure.
msgpack.assoc: Decode maps as associative arrays instead of objects (On/Off).
msgpack.use_str8_serialization: Use str8 type for short strings in MessagePack (On/Off).
mysqli.allow_local_infile: Allow LOAD DATA LOCAL INFILE (security sensitive) (On/Off).
mysqli.default_host: Default MySQL host for mysqli (empty = localhost/socket).
mysqli.default_pw: Default MySQL password (use empty; credentials should be explicit).
mysqli.default_socket: Default MySQL UNIX socket or named pipe.
mysqli.local_infile_directory: Restrict LOCAL INFILE file directory (path whitelist).
mysqli.max_links: Maximum number of mysqli links (-1 = unlimited).
mysqli.max_persistent: Maximum number of persistent mysqli links (-1 = unlimited).
mysqli.rollback_on_cached_plink: Rollback open transaction when reusing persistent link (On/Off).
mysqlnd.collect_memory_statistics: Collect detailed memory stats in mysqlnd (may be costly) (0/1).
mysqlnd.fetch_data_copy: Copy row data into zvals (0) or reference buffers (1) (performance trade-off).
mysqlnd.log_mask: Bitmask controlling mysqlnd debug categories to log.
mysqlnd.mempool_default_size: Default size of mysqlnd memory pool (bytes).
mysqlnd.net_cmd_buffer_size: Default command buffer size (bytes) for mysqlnd.
mysqlnd.net_read_buffer_size: Default read buffer size (bytes) for mysqlnd.
mysqlnd.sha256_server_public_key: Path to RSA public key for 'sha256_password' authentication.
mysqlnd.trace_alloc: Trace mysqlnd memory allocations to specified target (file/STDERR).
mysqlnd_azure.enableRedirect: Enable MySQL Azure redirect. 0=Off,1=Preferred,2=On (strict) depending on driver version.
mysqlnd_azure.logfilePath: Path to mysqlnd_azure extension log file.
oci8.connection_class: Sets Oracle Database DRCP connection class name.
oci8.default_prefetch: Number of rows prefetch for queries (performance tuning).
oci8.events: Enable Oracle Database Advanced Queuing and Continuous Query Notification (On/Off).
oci8.persistent_timeout: Timeout (seconds) for persistent connection idle reuse (-1 = unlimited).
oci8.ping_interval: Interval in seconds to ping Oracle to validate connections.
oci8.statement_cache_size: Size of the client-side statement cache per connection.
odbc.check_persistent: Validate persistent ODBC connections before reuse (On/Off).
odbc.default_cursortype: Default ODBC cursor type: SQL_CURSOR_FORWARD_ONLY, SQL_CURSOR_KEYSET_DRIVEN, SQL_CURSOR_DYNAMIC, SQL_CURSOR_STATIC
odbc.default_db: Default ODBC database used when connecting without DSN.
odbc.default_pw: Default ODBC password (avoid using; specify explicitly).
odbc.defaultlrl: Default Long Read Length for ODBC (bytes).
odbc.max_links: Maximum number of ODBC connections (-1 = unlimited).
opcache.blacklist_filename: Path to file listing scripts to never cache (one path pattern per line).
opcache.cache_id: Unique ID for opcache SHM to allow multiple PHP instances to share cache.
opcache.consistency_checks: Run periodic checksum on cached scripts (0 disables; N = every N requests).
opcache.enable: Enable Zend OPcache for PHP scripts (On/Off).
opcache.enable_file_override: Allow bypassing file existence checks to improve performance (On/Off).
opcache.error_log: Write OPcache errors to this log file (empty = system log).
opcache.file_cache: Directory for file-based cache (in addition to SHM). Improves warmup/restart.
opcache.file_cache_fallback: Use file cache when SHM is full (On/Off).
opcache.file_cache_only: Cache in files only, disable SHM (Off/On) (debug/readonly FS use-cases).
opcache.file_update_protection: Delay (seconds) before caching a file that has been updated (0 disables).
opcache.force_restart_timeout: Time (seconds) for OPcache to finish restart.
opcache.inherited_hack: Legacy hack for inherited classes (removed in newer PHP).
opcache.jit: JIT mode string (PHP 8+). Values: 'disable','tracing','function','on' with optional numeric tuning.
opcache.jit_bisect_limit: Binary search limit when diagnosing JIT crashes (0 disables).
opcache.jit_blacklist_root_trace: Max root traces before blacklisting a function (JIT tuning).
opcache.jit_blacklist_side_trace: Max side traces before blacklisting (JIT tuning).
opcache.jit_buffer_size: Size (bytes or MB suffix) of JIT code buffer (0 disables JIT compilation).
opcache.jit_hot_func: Hotness threshold for compiling whole functions (JIT tuning).
opcache.jit_hot_loop: Hotness threshold for compiling loops (JIT tuning).
opcache.jit_hot_return: Hotness threshold for compiling returns (JIT tuning).
opcache.jit_hot_side_exit: Hotness threshold for compiling side exits (JIT tuning).
opcache.jit_max_exit_counters: Max number of exit counters (JIT tuning).
opcache.jit_max_loop_unrolls: Max loop unrolls allowed by JIT (JIT tuning).
opcache.jit_max_polymorphic_calls: Max polymorphic call targets tracked (JIT tuning).
opcache.jit_max_recursive_calls: Max recursive calls to record in JIT (JIT tuning).
opcache.jit_max_recursive_returns: Max recursive returns tracked by JIT (JIT tuning).
opcache.jit_max_root_traces: Max root traces compiled per function (JIT tuning).
opcache.jit_max_side_traces: Max side traces compiled per function (JIT tuning).
opcache.jit_max_trace_length: Max length of a single compiled JIT trace (JIT tuning).
opcache.jit_prof_threshold: JIT profiler threshold (fractional). Lower compiles earlier.
opcache.max_accelerated_files: Max number of PHP files cached in SHM.
opcache.max_file_size: Skip caching for files larger than this (bytes; 0 = no limit).
opcache.max_wasted_percentage: Max allowed fragmentation before restart (% of wasted memory).
opcache.memory_consumption: Total SHM memory size (MB) for OPcache.
opcache.mmap_base: Base address for SHM memory mapping (Windows only; leave empty normally).
opcache.preload: Path to preload script to compile at startup (PHP 7.4+).
opcache.protect_memory: Protect code cache from unexpected writes (On/Off; performance cost).
opcache.restrict_api: Restrict OPcache API (ocontrol/status) to this path prefix.
opcache.revalidate_freq: How often (seconds) to check file timestamps for changes (0 = always).
opcache.revalidate_path: Resolve include_path for file existence on revalidation (On/Off).
opcache.save_comments: Preserve PHP doc comments in cached opcodes (On/Off).
opcache.use_cwd: Use current working directory to disambiguate same-named files (On/Off).
opcache.validate_permission: Validate script file permissions before caching (On/Off).
opcache.validate_timestamps: Check timestamps for file changes (On/Off). Off requires manual reset to reload.
openssl.cafile: Path to CA bundle for OpenSSL verification (fallback if system store not used).
openssl.capath: Path to directory containing CA certificates (hashed filenames).
opentelemetry.allow_stack_extension: Allow using Zend observer stack extension with OTEL (On/Off).
opentelemetry.attr_hooks_enabled: Enable attribute hooks for automatic span attributes (On/Off).
opentelemetry.attr_post_handler_function: Callable to run after hook handling (FQCN::method).
opentelemetry.attr_pre_handler_function: Callable to run before hook handling (FQCN::method).
opentelemetry.conflicts: Comma-separated list of conflicting extensions to detect.
opentelemetry.validate_hook_functions: Validate hook function existence at startup (On/Off).
pcov.directory: Limit code coverage to this directory (empty = all).
pcov.enabled: Enable PCOV coverage collection (1) or disable (0).
pcov.exclude: PCRE pattern to exclude files from coverage.
pcov.initial.files: Initial number of files to allocate coverage storage for.
pcov.initial.memory: Initial memory (bytes) to allocate for coverage data.
pcre.backtrack_limit: PCRE backtracking limit (higher allows more complex regex but costs CPU).
pcre.recursion_limit: PCRE recursion depth limit (affects stack usage).
pdo_odbc.db2_instance_name: DB2 instance name for pdo_odbc on some platforms.
pdo_sqlsrv.client_buffer_max_kb_size: Max size (KB) of client-side buffer for result sets.
pdo_sqlsrv.report_additional_errors: Report extended error details from sqlsrv (On/Off).
pgsql.auto_reset_persistent: Reset session on persistent connection reuse (On/Off).
pgsql.log_notice: Log server NOTICE messages to PHP error log (On/Off).
pgsql.max_links: Max number of PostgreSQL connections (-1 = unlimited).
phalcon.db.escape_identifiers: Escape SQL identifiers by default in Phalcon ORM (On/Off).
phalcon.db.force_casting: Force casting of DB values to PHP types (On/Off).
phalcon.form.strict_entity_property_chec: Strictly validate entity properties in forms (On/Off).
phalcon.orm.case_insensitive_column_map: Treat column map keys as case-insensitive (On/Off).
phalcon.orm.cast_on_hydrate: Cast fields to declared types while hydrating (On/Off).
phalcon.orm.column_renaming: Rename columns to model property names (On/Off).
phalcon.orm.dynamic_update: Update only changed fields in UPDATE statements (On/Off).
phalcon.orm.enable_implicit_joins: Allow implicit joins in model queries (On/Off).
phalcon.orm.exception_on_failed_metadata: Throw exception if metadata cannot be saved (On/Off).
phalcon.orm.exception_on_failed_save: Throw exception if saving a model fails (On/Off).
phalcon.orm.ignore_unknown_columns: Ignore unknown columns in result set (On/Off).
phalcon.orm.late_state_binding: Enable late state binding for find/create methods (On/Off).
phalcon.orm.resultset_prefetch_records: Number of records to prefetch for resultsets (0 = driver default).
phar.cache_list: Comma-separated list of PHAR files to preload into cache.
phar.readonly: Disallow creating or modifying PHAR archives (On/Off).
phar.require_hash: Require PHAR archives to have a signature (On/Off).
phpdbg.auth: Authentication token required by phpdbg_webhelper (for security).
phpdbg.path: Path restriction for phpdbg_webhelper access (document root).
pinpoint_php.DebugReport: Enable debug reporting for Pinpoint agent (yes/no).
pinpoint_php.SendSpanTimeOutMs: Timeout (ms) when sending spans to collector (0 = default).
pinpoint_php.TraceLimit: Max number of traces to collect (-1 = unlimited).
pinpoint_php.UnitTest: Enable unit test mode for Pinpoint (yes/no).
protobuf.keep_descriptor_pool_after_requ: Keep Protobuf descriptor pool across requests (0/1) for performance.
redis.arrays.algorithm: Redis Array hashing algorithm (e.g., 'consistent' variants or 'crc32').
redis.arrays.auth: Password(s) for Redis Array servers (CSV aligned to hosts).
redis.arrays.connecttimeout: Connect timeout (seconds) for Redis Array servers (0 = default).
redis.arrays.consistent: Use consistent hashing for Redis Array (0/1).
redis.arrays.distributor: Custom callable class for key distribution.
redis.arrays.functions: Callable for key hashing and target selection (advanced).
redis.arrays.hosts: List of Redis hosts for sharded arrays (CSV).
redis.arrays.index: Use Redis Array indexing (0/1) for multi-gets/pipelines.
redis.arrays.names: Named pools for Redis Array definitions (CSV).
redis.arrays.pconnect: Use persistent connections for Redis Array (0/1).
redis.arrays.previous: Previous server list for migration (CSV) to assist rehashing.
redis.arrays.readtimeout: Read timeout (seconds) for Redis Array connections (0 = default).
redis.clusters.persistent: Use persistent connections to Redis Cluster (0/1).
redis.clusters.seeds: Seed nodes for Redis Cluster autodiscovery (CSV 'host:port').
redis.pconnect.connection_limit: Max persistent connections per process (0 = unlimited).
redis.pconnect.echo_check_liveness: Use ECHO to check connection liveness (1/0).
redis.pconnect.pool_detect_dirty: Detect and reset dirty connections borrowed from pool (0/1).
redis.pconnect.pool_pattern: Key pattern to identify pools for persistent connections.
redis.pconnect.pool_poll_timeout: Timeout (ms) waiting for a connection from pool (0 = wait forever).
redis.session.compression: Compression algorithm for Redis sessions (e.g., 'gzip','lz4','zstd'). Empty disables.
redis.session.compression_level: Compression level for Redis session compression (algorithm-dependent).
redis.session.early_refresh: Refresh session TTL earlier during request (0/1).
redis.session.lock_retries: Number of retries to acquire session lock.
seaslog.appender_retry: Retry times when network appender fails (0 disables retry).
seaslog.buffer_size: Buffer size (bytes) for in-memory log buffering (0 = disable).
seaslog.default_basepath: Base log directory for SeasLog file appender.
seaslog.default_datetime_format: Datetime format string for log timestamps.
seaslog.recall_depth: Depth of backtrace to record for certain logs (0 = disabled).
seaslog.remote_host: Remote syslog/collector host for network appender.
seaslog.throw_exception: Throw exceptions on SeasLog internal errors (On/Off).
seaslog.trace_performance_max_depth: Max stack depth to record in performance tracing.
seaslog.trace_performance_max_functions_: Max functions per stack level to record.
seaslog.trace_performance_min_function_w: Min wall time (ms) to include a function in performance trace.
seaslog.trace_performance_min_wall_time: Min wall time (ms) to trigger performance trace.
seaslog.trace_performance_sample_rate: Sampling rate (permille or percent depending on build) for performance trace.
seaslog.trace_performance_start_depth: Start depth for performance tracing (skip shallower frames).
seaslog.trim_wrap: Trim and wrap long log messages (On/Off).
session.auto_start: Automatically start a session for each request (On/Off).
session.cache_expire: Cache limiter max age (minutes) for session cache headers.
session.cookie_httponly: Set HttpOnly flag on session cookie (On/Off).
session.cookie_lifetime: Lifetime (seconds) of the session cookie (0 = until browser closes).
session.cookie_path: Path attribute for the session cookie (default '/').
session.cookie_samesite: SameSite attribute for session cookie. Values: '', 'Lax', 'Strict', 'None'.
session.cookie_secure: Send session cookie only over HTTPS (On/Off).
session.gc_maxlifetime: Seconds after which data will be seen as 'garbage' and cleaned up.
session.lazy_write: Only write session if data changed (On/Off).
session.name: Name of the session (cookie name), default 'PHPSESSID'.
session.referer_check: Invalidate session if Referer does not contain this substring (empty disables).
session.save_path: Path or handler-specific connection string for sessions.
session.sid_length: Length of session ID in characters.
session.trans_sid_hosts: Allowed hostnames for transparent SID support (CSV). Empty disables.
session.trans_sid_tags: HTML tags/attributes to rewrite with SID when trans_sid is enabled.
session.upload_progress.cleanup: Cleanup upload progress data once complete (On/Off).
session.upload_progress.name: POST field name used to identify upload progress key.
session.upload_progress.prefix: Prefix for upload progress entries in session data.
session.use_cookies: Use cookies to store session ID (On/Off).
session.use_only_cookies: Use only cookies (no URL-based session IDs) (On/Off).
session.use_strict_mode: Reject uninitialized session IDs to prevent fixation (On/Off).
session.use_trans_sid: Enable transparent SID support (adds SID to URLs/forms) (On/Off).
soap.wsdl_cache_dir: Directory where WSDL cache files are stored.
soap.wsdl_cache_limit: Maximum number of cached WSDL files.
soap.wsdl_cache_ttl: Time-to-live in seconds for cached WSDL files.
sqlite3.defensive: Enable SQLite defensive mode for safer behavior (On/Off).
sqlite3.extension_dir: Directory to load SQLite3 loadable extensions from.
sqlsrv.ClientBufferMaxKBSize: Max client buffer size (KB) for non-forward-only result sets.
sqlsrv.LogSeverity: sqlsrv log severity bitmask (ALL (-1), ERROR (1), NOTICE (4), WARNING (2)).
stomp.default_broker: Default STOMP broker URI, e.g., tcp://host:61613.
stomp.default_connection_timeout_usec: Additional microseconds for STOMP connect timeout.
stomp.default_password: Default password used by STOMP connections.
stomp.default_read_timeout_sec: Default read timeout (seconds) for STOMP operations.
stomp.default_read_timeout_usec: Additional microseconds for STOMP read timeout.
sysvshm.init_mem: Initial memory (bytes) to allocate when creating a SysV shared memory segment.
taint.error_level: Error level when tainted data is used unsafely. Common: E_WARNING, E_ERROR.
tidy.clean_output: Automatically clean and repair output with Tidy (On/Off).
tidy.default_config: Path to default Tidy configuration file.
trader.real_precision: Number of decimal digits for PECL trader extension results.
trader.real_round_mode: Rounding mode for trader results. Values: HALF_UP, HALF_DOWN, HALF_EVEN and HALF_ODD.
uploadprogress.file.contents_template: Template path for saving captured upload contents (sprintf-style with %s key).
uploadprogress.file.filename_template: Template path for upload progress meta file (sprintf-style with %s key).
uploadprogress.get_contents: Enable capturing partial uploaded file contents (0/1).
vld.col_sep: Column separator when dumping in tabular formats.
vld.execute: Execute script after dumping (1) or not (0).
vld.format: Output format. 0=Human readable, 1=Machine (XML) depending on version.
vld.save_dir: Directory to save VLD dumps instead of printing to stdout.
vld.save_paths: Save file paths in dump files (0/1).
vld.verbosity: Verbosity level of VLD output (1=basic, higher = more detail).
wincache.apppoolid: IIS application pool ID to segment caches (auto-detected if empty).
wincache.chkinterval: Seconds between file change checks for FPC (file cache).
wincache.fcachesize: Opcode file cache size (MB) for WinCache.
wincache.fcenabledfilter: Regex filter of files to include/exclude for file cache.
wincache.fcndetect: Detect file changes to invalidate cache (On/Off).
wincache.filecount: Max number of files WinCache tracks.
wincache.filemapdir: Directory for WinCache file mappings (SHM backing).
wincache.ignorelist: Semicolon-separated list of paths to ignore for caching.
wincache.localheap: Size (MB) of local heap memory (0 = disabled).
wincache.maxfilesize: Maximum file size (KB) eligible for opcode caching.
wincache.namesalt: Salt for WinCache item names to avoid collisions.
wincache.reroute_enabled: Enable stream wrapper re-route for include path resolution (On/Off).
wincache.ttlmax: Maximum TTL for entries in caches (seconds).
xdebug.cli_color: Use ANSI colors in CLI Xdebug output (0=Auto,1=On,2=Off in older versions; now 0/1).
xdebug.client_discovery_header: Comma-separated headers used to auto-discover client IP (e.g., 'HTTP_X_FORWARDED_FOR').
xdebug.client_host: Debugger client host (IDE) to connect to for debugging/profiling.
xdebug.cloud_id: Xdebug Cloud ID to use cloud debugging service.
xdebug.collect_return: Collect function return values in traces (On/Off).
xdebug.discover_client_host: Discover client host via HTTP headers (On/Off).
xdebug.dump.COOKIE: Superglobal keys from $_COOKIE to dump on error (CSV or '*' for all).
xdebug.dump_once: Only dump superglobals once per request (On/Off).
xdebug.dump_undefined: Show values for undefined keys when dumping (On/Off).
xdebug.file_link_format: IDE link template for stack traces (e.g., 'phpstorm://open?file=%f&line=%l').
xdebug.filename_format: Format for filenames displayed (e.g., full path vs basename).
xdebug.force_display_errors: Force display_errors=On when Xdebug reports errors (On/Off).
xdebug.force_error_reporting: Force error_reporting to at least this bitmask while Xdebug is active.
xdebug.gc_stats_output_name: Filename pattern for GC stats files (supports %p for PID).
xdebug.halt_level: Error levels that trigger request halt (bitmask).
xdebug.log: Path to Xdebug communication log (for diagnostics).
xdebug.max_nesting_level: Max function nesting depth before Xdebug aborts (protects against recursion).
xdebug.max_stack_frames: Max stack frames to return to the client (-1 = unlimited).
xdebug.output_dir: Directory to write trace, profiler, and dump files.
xdebug.profiler_append: Append to existing profiler file instead of overwriting (On/Off).
xdebug.show_error_trace: Show stack trace on PHP errors (On/Off).
xdebug.show_local_vars: Show local variables in error stack traces (On/Off).
xdebug.start_upon_error: Start debugger when an error occurs. Values: 'default','yes','no','trigger'.
xdebug.start_with_request: Start debugger with each request. Values: 'default','yes','no','trigger'.
xdebug.trace_options: Trace options bitmask (e.g., include return values, memory usage).
xdebug.trace_output_name: Trace filename pattern (supports %c for CRC32, %p for PID, etc.).
xdebug.trigger_value: Value required in trigger (cookie/GET/POST) to start debugging/trace when in 'trigger' mode.
xdebug.var_display_max_children: Max number of array/object children to display.
xdebug.var_display_max_data: Max string data length to display.
xdebug.var_display_max_depth: Max depth for nested arrays/objects when displaying variables.
xhprof.collect_additional_info: Collect CPU/memory info along with function timings (0/1).
xhprof.output_dir: Directory where xhprof runs are saved.
xhprof.sampling_depth: Max stack depth when sampling profiler is enabled.
xhprof.sampling_interval: Sampling interval in microseconds for sampling mode.
xmysqlnd.net_read_timeout: Network read timeout in seconds for xmysqlnd.
xmysqlnd.trace_alloc: Trace xmysqlnd memory allocations to target (file/STDERR).
yac.compress_threshold: Minimum value size (bytes) to enable compression in YAC (-1 disables).
yac.enable: Enable YAC (Yet Another Cache) shared memory cache (On/Off).
yaconf.check_delay: Seconds between checks for changed config files in Yaconf.
yaconf.directory: Directory containing INI configuration files for Yaconf.
yaf.action_prefer: Prefer action controllers over regular controllers (0/1).
yaf.environ: Default environment name for Yaf application (e.g., 'product','dev').
yaf.forward_limit: Max number of forwards allowed per request.
yaf.library: Global library directory for Yaf autoloading.
yaf.name_separator: Name separator for class to path conversion (e.g., '_').
yaf.name_suffix: Use class name suffix convention (1) or prefix (0).
yaf.use_namespace: Use PHP namespaces for Yaf classes (0/1).
yaf.use_spl_autoload: Use SPL autoloader instead of Yaf's autoload (0/1).
yaml.output_canonical: Use canonical form for YAML output (0/1).
yaml.output_indent: Number of spaces for indentation in YAML output.
yaml.output_width: Preferred line width for folding in YAML output.
yar.connect_timeout: Yar RPC connect timeout in milliseconds.
yar.content_type: Default Content-Type header for Yar requests.
yar.packager: Default packager for Yar payload. Values: 'php','json','msgpack'.
yar.timeout: Yar RPC request timeout in milliseconds.
zend_test.not_empty_str_test: Zend test INI for non-empty string value behavior in tests.
zend_test.observer.show_opcode_in_user_h: Show opcode in user error handler (On/Off).
zend_test.observer.show_return_type: Print function return types in observer logs (On/Off).
zend_test.observer.show_return_value: Print function return values in observer logs (On/Off).
zend_test.quantity_value: Test numeric INI value for zend_test (integer).
zend_test.str_test: Test string INI value for zend_test extension.
zstd.output_compression: Enable Zstandard output compression via zstd.output_handler (On/Off).
zstd.output_compression_dict: Path to zstd compression dictionary to use for output (optional).
